name: @hdkiller/pi-langfuse
description_en: Production-grade Langfuse observability for Pi. Tracks prompts, turns, tools, and streaming assistant responses with native trace hierarchies, token usage, and cost monitoring.
description_zh: Pi 的生产级 Langfuse 可观察性。跟踪提示、轮次、工具和流式助手响应，具有原生跟踪层次结构、令牌使用情况和成本监控
